subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Lord of grace and bounty, Who alone is worthy and befitting, for through His blessed and exalted Word the ocean of generosity surgeth and shineth forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک فضل و عطا را لایق و سزا که بکلمه مبارکه علیا بحر جود مواج و مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
